title: agrostis castellana var. hispanica
intro: Agrostis castellana var. hispanica, also known as Spanish bent or Spanish bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis castellana var. hispanica include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, it can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
